title: How to Log In
content: Instructions on how to log in to the e-DiVA application. This section explains the steps required to access your account securely.

title: How to Update Your Profile
content: Instructions on how to update your personal profile information within the e-DiVA application.

title: How to Search e-DiVA Content
content: Instructions on how to search for educational materials, resources, and caregiving information using the search feature.

title: How to Access the Online Course
content: Instructions on how to access and complete the iSupport online course and related learning materials.

title: How to Use the Diary
content: Instructions on how to use the diary feature to organise appointments and caregiving activities.

title: How to Use Peer Support
content: Instructions on how to connect with other carers using the peer support feature.

title: How to Access Videos and Animations
content: Instructions on how to view educational videos and animations within the app.

title: How to Find Dementia Services
content: Instructions on how to locate available dementia care services in your area.

title: How to Use the Chatbot
content: Instructions on how to use the e-DiVA chatbot to ask questions and receive caregiving support.
